author: saiken
description: Track the open questions in your vault and surface new notes that may answer them. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Israel Avila

manifest.name: Standing Questions

name: Standing Questions

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Track the open questions in your vault and surface new notes that may answer them.

The optional Pro semantic feature uses the Second Read engine — a local, offline sidecar installed in one click and SHA-256-verified. Free features need no engine.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/israerusan/standing-questions/compare/0.9.0...0.9.1
